overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character exploring a coastal beach during golden hour. The character walks along grassy cliffs and sandy shores with distinctive red banners marking the rocky outcrops, showcasing the game's cinematic visual style.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path transitioning to beach

events.description: descends from grassy cliffside path onto sandy beach terrain

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along the coastal cliffside path toward the beach, traditional swords visible on back, wide-brimmed hat swaying with movement

entered.detail: tall white-gray cliff face with vertical striations rising from the coastline
vertical red flags or banners hanging in rows from the cliff face
calm sea with gentle waves reflecting the golden sunset light
distant mountain peak with visible snow against the hazy sky
dry yellow-brown grass covering the cliffside walking path
golden sand transitioning from the grass path down to the water
gentle ocean waves rolling onto the shore with white foam
massive rock outcropping in the water near the shore

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a grassy coastal path with towering cliffs adorned with red banners on the left. The ocean stretches to the right with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance, bathed in warm golden hour light as the terrain transitions from grass to sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach along the shoreline

events.description: character turns slightly to walk along the water's edge where waves meet the sand

agents.ego_description: character walking along the sandy beach, occasionally approaching the water's edge where waves lap at the shore, exploring the Crimson Dye Beach area

entered.detail: bright lens flare from the setting sun reflecting off the water surface
small rocky island or formation visible in the distance on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character explores the sandy beach with the rocky cliffs and red banners now visible on the right side as the beach curves along the coastline. The setting sun creates a brilliant glare across the water as gentle waves wash onto the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline at the base of cliffs

events.description: ground surface changes from soft sand to rocky pebbles and boulders

agents.ego_description: character carefully walking over uneven rocky terrain along the shoreline, navigating around boulders at the base of the cliff

entered.detail: uneven terrain of gray rocks and pebbles replacing the sandy beach
large scattered boulders along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves from sand to rocky shoreline, navigating through boulders at the base of the cliff. The red banners are now prominently visible up close on the left cliff face, while waves continue to crash against the rocks along the Crimson Dye Beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal landscape that shifts from high grassy cliffs down to a rugged, rocky shoreline. It begins with a samurai walking along a grassy path flanked by towering cliffs and red banners, with a snow-capped mountain visible across the golden hour ocean. As the terrain transitions from grass to sand, the camera follows the character onto a curving beach where the cliffs and banners shift to the right and the setting sun creates a brilliant glare across the water. The scene then moves from the open sand toward a rocky shoreline, navigating through boulders at the base of the cliff. Finally, the camera closes in on the red banners clinging to the left cliff face as waves crash against the stones of Crimson Dye Beach.
